title: Fabled Roots
description: Fabled Roots adds 10 unique races and 10 powerful classes to Minecraft, along with new weapons, items, spells and structures to explore.
body:
## 📖 Description Fabled Roots is a RPG-lite data pack that introduces 10 unique races and 10 diverse classes, along with new weapons, items, spells, and structures. When you first join a world or server, you’ll choose a race and class to shape your playstyle — No worries you can change them anytime down the road from the pause menu. These systems are designed to enhance the classic Minecraft loop, giving your adventure a fresh twist without getting in the way. ## 🧙‍♂️ Races Players of the same race gain a minor Regeneration effect when near each other, encouraging cooperative play.
Aetherian **Light-footed skyfolk who feel right at home up high and in the breeze.** - Height: 90-110% - 30 Blocks Safe Fall Distance - -3 Armor - Hits with Spears have a chance to shoot a Wind Charge - Strength & Luck Effect above Y-Level 200 - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Slow Levitation
Dunesworn **Tough desert wanderers built for heat, sandstorms, and endless horizons.** - Height: 85-95% - +3 Armor - -2 Knockback Resistance - Saturation effect for kills with a Scimitar - Strength & Luck Effect in Desert Biomes - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Dries Wet Sponges in Main-/Offhand
Endling **Mysterious beings from the End, quiet, clever, and just a bit strange.** - Height: 105-120% - -50% Gravity - +50% Fall Damage Multiplier - Hits with Scythes have a chance to shoot a Shulker Bullet - Strength & Luck Effect in The End - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Applies Levitation Effect to nearby entities
Frostborne **Snowy survivors who don't mind the cold and always know where to find shelter in a blizzard.** - Height: 95-105% - +10% Movement Speed - -50% Submerged Mining Speed - Kills with Clubs freeze nearby entities shortly - Strength & Luck Effect in Cold Biomes - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Applies Slowness Effect to nearby entities
Moonshroud **Night-loving folk who move like shadows and feel strongest under starlight.** - Height: 85-100% - +50% Sneaking Speed - -30% Attack Damage - Throwing Knives inflict Poison damage - Strength & Luck Effect during Night Time - Transmit Range: 0 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Turns invisible
Netherian **Fireproof and fearless, they're right at home near lava and never flinch at heat.** - Height: 90-110% - +100% Attack Knockback - -25% Attack Speed - Hits with Broadswords have a chance to shoot a Fireball - Strength & Luck Effect in The Nether - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Becomes Fire Resistant
Oakhearted **Forest dwellers with calm spirits, strong roots, and a deep love for trees.** - Height: 100-110% - +50% Jump Strength - +100% Burning Time - Thrown Hatchets inflict Weakness - Strength & Luck Effect in Forest Biomes - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Applies Weakness Effect to nearby entities
Orebringer **Cave explorers with a knack for mining and a backpack full of shiny stuff.** - Height: 75-90% - +3 Armor Toughness - +20% Gravity - Faster Attack Speed with Maces - Strength & Luck Effect below Y-Level 0 - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Gets Haste Effect
Palehearted **Quiet and pale, they're more at home in the dark and have a soft spot for forgotten places.** - Height: 100-110% - +25% Jump Strength - -10% Attack Damage - +50% Burning Time - Absorption effect for kills with a Rapier - Strength & Luck Effect in Pale Garden Biomes - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 256 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Gets Night Vision Effect
Turtlekin **Ocean travelers with sturdy shells and a laid-back love for the sea.** - Height: 85-110% - +15 Oxygen Bonus - -15% Movement Speed - Holding a Trident gives Dolphin's Grace effect - Strength & Luck Effect in Ocean Biomes - Transmit Range: 256 Blocks - Receive Range: 128 Blocks - Crouch Ability: Gets Conduit Power Effect
## 🗡️ Classes
Archer **Quick on their feet and quicker with a bow—distance is their best friend.** - Wind Charges entities hit with a Cross-/Bow - Gains extra Exp by hitting entities with a Cross-/Bow
Bard **Brings music, magic, and a bit of mischief wherever they go** - Can tap into the secret magic of Goat Horns - Gains extra Exp by using Goat Horns
Builder **Loves blocks, blueprints, and turning ideas into reality** - Block Interaction Range: 6.5 - Gains extra Exp by placing blocks
Cleric **Master of potions and remedies, always ready with a brew to save the day** - Clears Poison, Slowness & Weakness effects - Gains extra Exp by consuming Potions and trading with Cleric Villagers
Fighter **Straightforward and tough—if it moves, they can probably punch it** - +10% Attack Damage - Gets a short Strength effect when killing an entity - Gains extra Exp by killing entities and blocking damage
Hermit **Keeps to themselves, knows every cave and corner, and prefers quiet over company** - Has Strength effect as long as no Players, Villagers, Piglins or Raiders are around - Gains extra Exp when no one is around
Miner **Lives for deep tunnels, rare ores, and the thrill of the dig** - +50% Block Breaking Speed - Gains extra Exp by mining Ores
Rancher **Good with animals, and always has a pen full of friends** - Speed Boost while riding animals - Gains extra Exp by taming, breeding and having animals on a leash
Scout **Fast, sharp-eyed, and never lost—perfect for exploring what's ahead** - Waypoint Receive Range: 256 Blocks - Looking at entities through a Spyglass makes the targets glow and slows them down - Hostile Entities within an 8 Block radius glow - Gains extra Exp when hostile entities are within an 8 Block radius
Survivor **Scrappy and self-reliant, they make it through anything with just the basics** - Chance to get a small Regeneration effect when taking damage - Gains extra Exp by taking damage
## 🛠️ Technical Gibberish Starting with **v1.7** some Aspects can configured in-game by Admins/OPs. `/function fabled_roots` opens the config menu. **The data pack also functions as the resource pack** for the needed textures and other assets. *(Mod users automatically have the resources enabled)* For **PaperMC users**, it is recommended to set the `paper.maxChatCommandInputSize` property to a value between 512 and 1024. More information can be found in the [PaperMC Docs](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/reference/system-properties/#papermaxchatcommandinputsize). Also make sure to have `allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards` enabled in your paper configs. ## 📝 Translations Want to play in your own language? You can help us out by contributing on our **[Crowdin Page](https://crowdin.com/project/explorers-eden)**! Once a translation for a language is finished, it’ll be added to the data pack for you to enjoy. ## ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions We're here to help! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to hop on our discord server to ask for help in our **Data Pack Section**. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/f2pMggfgVv) ## 🎮 Explorer's Eden SMP Join **[A Realm Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/server/a-realm-recrafted)**, our Minecraft SMP! Enjoy a world featuring all of our (actively maintained) data packs, as well as some exclusive ones. It’s completely free without any microtransactions. Come build, explore, and craft with us today!
